history.action: Initialized SDLC workflow. Token minted and assigned to Analyst.
Completed Phase 1. User stories and acceptance criteria finalized.
Completed Phase 2. ADRs, system architecture, and JSON schemas finalized.
Completed Phase 3. Full SvelteKit app, engine, stores, components, CI/CD, and unit tests created.
Completed Phase 4. All unit, integration, and E2E tests created and passing. QA sign-off granted.
Sprint 1 closed. Hotfixes merged. Sprint 2 opened. Architect confirmed game-config.schema.json covers Spider Solitaire without changes. Token passed to Developer.
